instruction: Convert ECC ABAP REPORT using includes and PERFORMs into S/4HANA ABAP class-based structure
input:
REPORT zabapgit LINE-SIZE 100.
SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF SCREEN 1001.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF SCREEN 1001.
TABLES sscrfields.
INCLUDE zabapgit_forms.
INITIALIZATION.
  PERFORM adjust_toolbar USING '1001'.
START-OF-SELECTION.
  PERFORM run.
AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT.
  PERFORM output.
AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON EXIT-COMMAND.
  PERFORM exit.
output:
REPORT zabapgit.
CLASS lcl_app DEFINITION FINAL.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    CLASS-METHODS main.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    CLASS-METHODS adjust_toolbar IMPORTING iv_dynnr TYPE sydynnr.
    CLASS-METHODS run.
    CLASS-METHODS on_output.
    CLASS-METHODS on_exit.
ENDCLASS.
CLASS lcl_app IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD main.
    lcl_app=>adjust_toolbar( iv_dynnr = '1001' ).
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD adjust_toolbar.
* implement UI toolbar adjustment or status here
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD run.
* business logic moved from PERFORM run
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD on_output.
* screen output handling
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD on_exit.
* cleanup
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.
INITIALIZATION. lcl_app=>main( ).
START-OF-SELECTION. lcl_app=>run( ).
AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT. lcl_app=>on_output( ).
AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON EXIT-COMMAND. lcl_app=>on_exit( ).

instruction: Refactor local startup FORM logic to S/4HANA-friendly methods without modal popups
input:
CLASS lcl_startup DEFINITION FINAL.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    CLASS-METHODS prepare_gui_startup RAISING zcx_abapgit_exception.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    CLASS-METHODS check_sapgui RAISING zcx_abapgit_exception.
ENDCLASS.
CLASS lcl_startup IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD check_sapgui.
    DATA lv_answer TYPE char1.
    IF zcl_abapgit_ui_factory=>get_frontend_services( )->is_sapgui_for_java( ) = abap_false.
      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
    lv_answer = zcl_abapgit_ui_factory=>get_popups( )->popup_to_confirm( iv_titlebar = 'Not supported SAPGUI' ).
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.
output:
CLASS lcl_startup DEFINITION FINAL.
  PUBLIC SECTION.
    CLASS-METHODS prepare_gui_startup RAISING zcx_abapgit_exception.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
    CLASS-METHODS ensure_frontend_supported RAISING zcx_abapgit_exception.
ENDCLASS.
CLASS lcl_startup IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD ensure_frontend_supported.
* In S/4, avoid modal GUI popups at startup; validate via services
    IF zcl_abapgit_ui_factory=>get_frontend_services( )->is_sapgui_for_java( ) = abap_true.
      RETURN.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.
  METHOD prepare_gui_startup.
    ensure_frontend_supported( ).
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

instruction: Use cleaner caching in factory method; prefer VALUE/NEW over CREATE OBJECT where possible
input:
CLASS zcl_abapgit_factory IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD get_sap_package.
    DATA: ls_sap_package TYPE ty_sap_package.
    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <ls_sap_package> TYPE ty_sap_package.
    READ TABLE gt_sap_package ASSIGNING <ls_sap_package> WITH TABLE KEY package = iv_package.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      ls_sap_package-package = iv_package.
      CREATE OBJECT ls_sap_package-instance TYPE zcl_abapgit_sap_package EXPORTING iv_package = iv_package.
      INSERT ls_sap_package INTO TABLE gt_sap_package ASSIGNING <ls_sap_package>.
    ENDIF.
    ri_sap_package = <ls_sap_package>-instance.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.
output:
CLASS zcl_abapgit_factory IMPLEMENTATION.
  METHOD get_sap_package.
    DATA existing TYPE ty_sap_package.
    READ TABLE gt_sap_package INTO existing WITH TABLE KEY package = iv_package.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR existing-instance IS NOT BOUND.
      DATA(new_entry) = VALUE ty_sap_package( package = iv_package instance = NEW zcl_abapgit_sap_package( iv_package = iv_package ) ).
      INSERT new_entry INTO TABLE gt_sap_package.
      existing = new_entry.
    ENDIF.
    ri_sap_package = existing-instance.
  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.
